nodes.context: Powerful 'Ndrangheta clan based in Siderno, Calabria, with branches in Canada and the US. Involved in international drug trafficking, money laundering, and extortion.
Criminal and mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy. The Commisso 'ndrina is a clan within it.
Branch of the 'Ndrangheta in the Greater Toronto Area, Canada, of which the Commisso 'ndrina is part.
Rival 'Ndrangheta clan in Siderno that feuded with the Commisso 'ndrina in the 1980s-1990s.
Powerful Camorra group allied with the Commisso 'ndrina in cocaine and marijuana trafficking from South America via the Netherlands.
Mafia-type organization in Campania, Italy. The Secondigliano Alliance is a Camorra group.
American Mafia family operating in Toronto and Hamilton, hired the Commisso brothers for a contract killing in the 1980s.
Outlaw motorcycle club whose hitman Cecil Kirby worked for Cosimo Commisso in Canada from 1976-1981.
Allied 'Ndrangheta clan mentioned in the infobox as an ally of the Commisso 'ndrina.
Allied 'Ndrangheta clan mentioned in the infobox as an ally of the Commisso 'ndrina.
Camorra clan allied with the Commisso 'ndrina, part of the Secondigliano Alliance.
Camorra clan allied with the Commisso 'ndrina, part of the Secondigliano Alliance.
Camorra clan allied with the Commisso 'ndrina, part of the Secondigliano Alliance.
Rival gang mentioned in the infobox as a rival of the Commisso 'ndrina.
Montreal Mafia family mentioned in the infobox as a rival of the Commisso 'ndrina.

edges.context: The Commisso 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
The Commisso 'ndrina's Canadian branch is part of the Siderno Group.
The Commisso and Costa clans feuded over control of Siderno in the 1980s-1990s, resulting in many deaths.
The Commisso 'ndrina is allied with the Secondigliano Alliance in cocaine and marijuana trafficking.
The Secondigliano Alliance is a Camorra group.
The Buffalo crime family hired the Commisso brothers for a contract killing in the 1980s.
Satan's Choice hitman Cecil Kirby worked for Cosimo Commisso from 1976-1981.
The Piromalli 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
The Pesce 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
The Contini clan is part of the Secondigliano Alliance, allied with the Commisso 'ndrina.
The Licciardi clan is part of the Secondigliano Alliance, allied with the Commisso 'ndrina.
The Mallardo clan is part of the Secondigliano Alliance, allied with the Commisso 'ndrina.
The Independent Soldiers are listed as a rival in the infobox.
The Rizzuto crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
